retry_reason: The function is a put-style wrapper; if it fails (e.g., due to a double-free or invalid state), retrying would be unsafe and indicates a prior bug.
contract_summary: This function is an exit callback for the atmel AES authenc transformation; it releases the authentication context (ctx->auth) by calling atmel_sha_authenc_free, which typically decrements a reference count or frees the underlying object. The caller (crypto subsystem) invokes this when the tfm instance is destroyed; after this call, the context must not be accessed. The operation is unconditional and void—no return value to check. The function assumes ctx->auth is valid and will be properly freed.
